active_families.thesis: Channel-style continuation has edge only in ranging regime; isolate that regime to remove trend bleed.
Funding mean reversion mechanism remains plausible but current bottleneck is trade density; test relaxed threshold before retiring.
Transfer the SOL funding-reversion structure to ETH 1h to test whether deeper liquidity improves signal frequency and execution quality.

abandoned_this_cycle.reason: Stagnant after 3+ iterations; PF remains sub-1 after cost despite high trade counts.
Three iterations with only one trade each; PF is low-N artifact, not durable edge.
Repeated anti-edge outcomes with PF ~0 and no regime showing viability.
Severe density failure and no profitable regime behavior.
Repeated zero-trade outcomes indicate structurally over-constrained entry logic.
Too few trades and persistent underperformance with no credible improvement trajectory.
Adequate sample size but deeply negative PF; no profitable regime in current architecture.
Immediate transfer failure on ETH with PF 0 and low density; pivot-supertrend branch deprioritized.

new_this_cycle.thesis: Asset-transfer test of funding-reversion logic from SOL to ETH to improve liquidity-adjusted signal quality.
